description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached double garage on the left and a driveway leading up to it. The house features a light-colored exterior with horizontal siding, a balcony above the main entrance, and a small porch area supported by white railings. Two palm trees and a patch of green lawn flank the walkway to the front door, adding a touch of landscaping. The windows are rectangular and symmetrically placed, with a larger window on the ground floor and smaller ones on the upper level. The roof of the main house is flat, while the garage has a dark gable roof. A red car is parked in the driveway, enhancing the residential and urban context.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, detached double garage, balcony, and palm trees in the front yard. The exterior is light-colored with horizontal siding and a red car parked in the driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance with porch and balcony, palm trees, and red car in the driveway.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flat side wall, upper and lower windows, and partial view of the garage roof and palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the house and garage, with minimal window openings and the gable roof of the garage.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the side of the garage, the driveway, and the palm tree near the sidewalk.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, white railings, steps, and a balcony above; flanked by palm trees and a concrete walkway.
